name: The safety failures we are not instrumenting: a perspective on hidden safety-critical challenges in modern AI systems
summary: arXiv:2607.19292v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current AI safety discourse still focuses disproportionately on visible failures, including obvious harms, dramatic misuse, and hypothetical catast...
description: arXiv:2607.19292v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current AI safety discourse still focuses disproportionately on visible failures, including obvious harms, dramatic misuse, and hypothetical catastrophic scenarios. That focus is incomplete. In deployed systems, many of the most consequential failures are quieter: plausible rather than spectacular, distributed across components rather than local...
author: Gjergji Kasneci, Enkelejda Kasneci
